bsky.text: While I was asleep, Lindsey Graham died and Conor McGregor was injured and defeated. I am buying a lotto ticket today.

bsky.name: Max B 💙 🔶 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 🇪🇺
bsky.text:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased. 

The move came from the players' union, not management.

bsky.name: Aaron Rupar
bsky.text: this, for me, is the defining Lindsey Graham statement
The Norwegian team has been a delight to watch and they represent all that is positive about football.
